productionEpochPolicy.closeRule: An epoch closes only after all creation targets and its bounded refinement-and-pruning slice pass validation and publication.

legacyPlayableUpgrades.note: Legacy playable upgrades remain excluded from new-production creation counts.

lastCatalogUnit.result: Accepted 10 genuinely new natural-language kit contracts after six additional duplicate, catalog-overlap, or blurred-scope rejections; no implementation was created.

lastCreationUnit.result: Upgraded Next Ledge so Slipstream Launch and Cacheline High converge at Windglass Relay, banking 134 preserved speed or 175 cargo mastery before generic ascent resumes; production creation counts remain unchanged.

lastRefinementUnit.result: Slipstream now lands as a mint forward pull while Cacheline lands as a harder amber snap through descriptor-authored tuning and existing latch, camera, squash, event, and synth owners.

lastCompletedUnit.scope: Next Ledge payoff latch recoil feel refinement
lastCompletedUnit.result: Both selected payoff catches now have readable branch-specific physical recoil: a mint forward/tall pull for Slipstream and a stronger amber/wide snap for Cacheline, without a new state, event, timer, entity, or feedback owner.
lastCompletedUnit.validation: All existing Next Ledge test entrypoints, affected JavaScript syntax checks, JSON, and diff checks passed. Playwright completed actual-input safe and shortcut routes to both payoff latches, proved release, failure, keyboard retry, and Advanced closed/open/closed, held 69 DOM nodes, one canvas, 76 descriptors, and 277 settled scene nodes, and reported zero console or page errors. Human View passed the first screen plus final mint and amber payoff latches with diagnostics closed. The matched 60-tick warm-up plus 180-tick active performance window improved from 218.26 to 130.15 ms average tick, 4.58 to 7.68 measured FPS, and 314.30 to 180.70 ms p95; settled entity counts stayed bounded.
lastCompletedUnit.publication: Pending fetch-before-push publication receipt; ProtoKits is unchanged and synchronized at 04d34f049f58ae359cf71d43466c429dac2a6d08.

exactNextUnit.goal: Let the payoff recoil resolve into one branch-specific first-swing release cue—mint glide window or amber aftershock—using existing swing angle, route-choice, HUD, and cue owners without a new control or state.
